entries.summary: P1 took northeast and east, with the guardian and marksman forming behind the raider.
entries.reasoning: P1 followed the assigned central durable formation plan. Board supply income was resolved before recruitment/movement, deck counters were spent only on the active turn, and no Copper was bought.

entries.summary: P2 opened west-south and staged a scout-heavy flank.
entries.reasoning: P2 followed the assigned flanking healing/control plan. Board supply income was resolved before recruitment/movement, deck counters were spent only on the active turn, and no Copper was bought.

entries.summary: P1 recruited a guardian and advanced toward center-north.
entries.reasoning: P1 followed the assigned central durable formation plan. Board supply income was resolved before recruitment/movement, deck counters were spent only on the active turn, and no Copper was bought.

entries.summary: P2 spent saved supply on another scout and flipped center-south.
entries.reasoning: P2 followed the assigned flanking healing/control plan. Board supply income was resolved before recruitment/movement, deck counters were spent only on the active turn, and no Copper was bought.

entries.summary: P1 claimed center-north and center, then removed the forward P2 scout with scout fire plus Zap damage.
entries.reasoning: P1 followed the assigned central durable formation plan. Board supply income was resolved before recruitment/movement, deck counters were spent only on the active turn, and no Copper was bought.

entries.summary: P2 could not yet afford support, but flipped southeast and killed the central P1 scout.
entries.reasoning: P2 followed the assigned flanking healing/control plan. Board supply income was resolved before recruitment/movement, deck counters were spent only on the active turn, and no Copper was bought.

entries.summary: P1 reinforced with another guardian and wounded the exposed druid without overcommitting.
entries.reasoning: P1 followed the assigned central durable formation plan. Board supply income was resolved before recruitment/movement, deck counters were spent only on the active turn, and no Copper was bought.

entries.summary: P2 finally added healer support and used marksman fire to remove the damaged central guardian.
entries.reasoning: P2 followed the assigned flanking healing/control plan. Board supply income was resolved before recruitment/movement, deck counters were spent only on the active turn, and no Copper was bought.
